steps.title: Find the common factor
steps.content: The terms $35x$ and $42$ share a greatest common factor of $7$. Factor $7$ out of both terms.

steps.title: Factor the expression
steps.content: Divide each term by $7$ inside the parentheses: $$ 35x+42=7(5x+6) $$ This expression is equivalent to the original. The answer is D.
